content.content:
1	/* ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
2	 * tokens.css — operator's portfolio
3	 * Canonical custom properties. Consumed by every component.
4	 * Dark is canonical; light is opt-in (toggle implemented separately).
5	 *
6	 * Vertical rhythm rule (suite 13/P03):
7	 *   All vertical spacing between content blocks is a multiple of
8	 *   var(--s-2) (8px). Text within a block follows the line-height
9	 *   of its type role. This rule is for prose; UI elements may use
10	 *   finer increments via the --s-* scale.
11	 * --------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
12	
13	:root,
14	:root[data-theme="dark"] {
15	  /* ----- v2 semantic colour palette (suite 13/P02) -----
16	     Dark is canonical. Hex with alpha (#RRGGBBAA) keeps tokens
17	     self-contained — no rgba(). All fg/bg pairs documented in
18	     docs/v2_audit.md ## Contrast deviations meet WCAG AA. */
19	
20	  /* surface */
21	  --bg:           #0c0e10;            /* base background          */
22	  --bg-mute:      #14171a;            /* muted surface            */
23	  --bg-raise:     #1b1f23;            /* raised surface (cards)   */
24	  --bg-overlay:   #06070824;          /* modal overlay            */
25	
26	  /* foreground */
27	  --fg:           #e8e6e1;            /* primary text             */
28	  --fg-mute:      #8b8a85;            /* secondary text           */
29	  --fg-faint:     #6e6e68;            /* tertiary text — adjusted from #5a5a55 to clear AA-large (see audit) */
30	  --fg-inverse:   #0c0e10;            /* text on accent surface   */
31	
32	  /* borders + dividers */
33	  --line:         #232629;            /* hairline                 */
34	  --line-strong:  #3a3d40;            /* emphatic border          */
35	
36	  /* accent — warm gold/amber inherited from v1 (B3). Do not change without authorization. */
37	  --accent:       #c9a96e;            /* primary accent (mono)    */
38	  --accent-mute:  #c9a96e22;          /* hover/wash               */
39	  --accent-fg:    #0c0e10;            /* text on accent           */
40	
41	  /* status — used sparingly (chat error states only) */
42	  --warn:         #d18b3a;
43	  --error:        #dc6e69;            /* adjusted from #d2615c to clear AA on bg-raise (see audit) */
44	  --ok:           #6da16a;
45	
46	  /* ----- v1 aliases (transitional) -------------------------
47	     Active components in src/components/* still reference v1
48	     names. Aliases map them onto the v2 palette so the visual
49	     ramp degrades gracefully until each component is migrated
50	     in subsequent suite-13 prompts. New code MUST consume the
51	     semantic v2 tokens above; do not introduce new --bg-N or
52	     --fg-hi/dim references. */
53	  --bg-0:        var(--bg);
54	  --bg-1:        var(--bg-mute);
55	  --bg-2:        var(--bg-raise);
56	  --bg-3:        var(--line);
57	  --rule:        var(--line);
58	  --fg-hi:       var(--fg);
59	  --fg-dim:      var(--fg-mute);
60	  --accent-dim:  var(--accent-mute);

lines: + * Tokens-only imports + base body rules. No component-specific styling here;
+ * components own their own classes via primitives.css or scoped modules.
-  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--s-3);
-  background: var(--bg-2); padding: 2px 6px; font-size: var(--t-xxs-size); color: var(--fg-mute);
-.palette-title { color: var(--fg); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
-.palette-ctx { color: var(--fg-mute); font-size: var(--t-xs-size); padding-left: var(--s-4); white-space: nowrap; }
-.palette-empty { padding: var(--s-4); color: var(--fg-mute); font-size: var(--t-xs-size); }
-  background: var(--bg-2); color: var(--fg); border: var(--border-hair);
-/* ----- ⌘K key-cap affordance (R04: replaces status bar's hint) ----- */
-  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
-  transition: color var(--d-fast) var(--ease), border-color var(--d-fast) var(--ease);
-/* Body content is always mounted (so layout is settled before width
-   animates). Visibility is animation-driven, not transition-driven, so
-   the entry repeats on every collapse→expand cycle including first mount. */
-/* R02: spine label fades out IN PLACE when expanded. No travel, no morph. */
-  .panel-body { animation: none; opacity: 1; transform: none; pointer-events: auto; }
-.dossier { padding: var(--s-6) var(--s-7); max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
-  display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between;
-  border-bottom: var(--border-hair); padding-bottom: var(--s-2); margin-bottom: var(--s-2);
-.dossier-sub   { color: var(--fg-dim); font-size: var(--t-sm-size); margin-top: var(--s-2); }
-.metadata-pane { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--t-sm-size); color: var(--fg); }
-.metadata-pane .row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 96px 1fr; gap: var(--s-3); padding: 4px 0; }
-.metadata-pane .k   { color: var(--fg-mute); text-align: right; text-transform: uppercase; }
-.synopsis { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: var(--t-md-size); line-height: var(--t-md-lh); color: var(--fg); max-width: var(--measure-prose); }
-.artifacts-h { color: var(--fg-mute); border-bottom: var(--border-hair); padding-bottom: var(--s-2); margin-bottom: var(--s-3); }
-.artifacts li { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr 1em; gap: var(--s-3); padding: 2px 0; font-size: var(--t-sm-size); }
-  color: var(--fg-mute); text-transform: uppercase; font-size: var(--t-xs-size); font-weight: normal;
-.pill-archived { color: var(--fg-mute); background: var(--bg-1); outline: 1px solid var(--rule); }
-.pe-prose { font-family: var(--font-serif); font-size: var(--t-md-size); line-height: 1.7; max-width: var(--measure-book); hyphens: auto; }

- `src/app/layout.tsx` exists
- `src/components/shell/ThemeInit.tsx` exists

Files created/modified per spec:
- `src/app/layout.tsx` — rewritten with v2 structure (head with ThemeInit; body with SiteHeader / `<main id="main">` / SiteFooter), title template `%s — Michael Quintin` sourced from `identity.ts`, viewport export with `viewport-fit=cover`, no global container.
- `src/app/globals.css` — replaced with token-only imports (reset → tokens → typography → primitives) plus base body rules (bg/fg/mono/antialiasing).
- `src/components/shell/SiteHeader.tsx` — placeholder with skip-link as first focusable element (P02 will populate).
- `src/components/shell/SiteFooter.tsx` — placeholder (P03 will populate).
- `src/components/shell/ThemeInit.tsx` — emits inline pre-hydration script (<1KB) reading `localStorage.theme` then matchMedia, sets `data-theme` on `<html>` before paint.
